slides.title: UE LABS
body_text:
NURIA BAS
UE CS&Q Director & Labs Director
slides.speaker_script_text:
[MANDATORY]
Introduction
Hello to everyone,
And welcome to <event name>. Like everything these days, we are doing it digitally, and the good news is that we can reach many more places and many more partners and customers this way. 
Firstly, I hope you are all doing well in this very special time. I also hope that Schneider supported you during this unprecedented period. 
Today I’m going to speak about sustainability and efficiency, 
And I’m going to add to that resiliency, where we have all stepped up. 
1
slides.content_transformation_recommendation: Preserve facts while redesigning layout and hierarchy from scratch.

slides.title: USA
body_text: © 2020 Schneider Electric, All Rights Reserved | Page 2
One lab in each manufacturing plant. Sarre Union, Molins de Rei & Capellades.
5 lab technicians, 1 Test & Expert Leader and Lab Manager.
Capellades Lab is CTDP (Client Test Data Program) by UL since 1999, with a File number DA307.
slides.speaker_script_text:
We are the most local of global companies
If you want to be local, you have to empower people locally. 
At Schneider, we have a balance: a synchronization between the people and the businesses we have around the world. 
Our unmatched proximity to you, enables us to better understand, anticipate and adapt with agility to support your business continuity.
2
accreditation_references: Capellades Lab is CTDP (Client Test Data Program) by UL since 1999, with a File number DA307.

slides.speaker_script_text:
[MANDATORY]
What does Digital bring?
Digital builds a smart future
And it’s also creating a more 
desirable
 future. 
A future that is human-centric: smart homes, smart buildings, smart manufacturing, smart infrastructure, smart cities
 which allow us collectively to better share and save the resources that we are consuming, in a more adapted way, for each of us. 
3

body_text:
UNIVERSAL ENCLOSURES LAB is inside

Customer Satisfaction & Quality Department

Lab is lead directly by the CS&Q Director
slides.speaker_script_text:
This
 is an example of a 
Text Slide
. Reference the different layout options in the 
Slide Master 
(under the View tab) 
for different variations. Remember, our new Brand Guidelines call for clean and simple messages and design. Reference the PowerPoint Guidelines on the Brand Book for tips and useful information on creating effective presentations.
4

slides.title: UE LABS
body_text:
CS&Q Director is leading directly UE labs and as well as the function of Quality Director for the labs. 

The Technical Director for labs is what we call internally “Test & Expert Leader”.

slides.title: Our Mission
body_text: Assure the quality of the standard of production
Ensure qualification of product evolutions or new products launch
Ensure certifications tests ( 1 UL accredited Lab )
Give support to the Customer Technical Support team
Manage the calibration of labs & plants equipment

SU: Sarre-Union Lab (France)
ML: Molins de Rei Lab (Spain)
KP: Capellades Lab (Spain)
accreditation_references: Ensure certifications tests ( 1 UL accredited Lab )

slides.title: Standards
body_text:
IEC 62208 
Empty enclosures for low-voltage switchgear and controlgear assemblies - General requirements

ISO 12944-6
Paints and varnishes — Corrosion protection of steel structures by protective paint systems — Part 6: Laboratory performance test methods
ISO 4624 Paints and varnishes — Pull-off test for adhesion

IEC 60079-0 Explosive atmospheres -- Part 0: Equipment - General requirements 

EN 61386-1 Conduit systems for cable management -- Part 1: General requirements

IEC 62208 
Empty enclosures for low-voltage switchgear and controlgear assemblies - General requirements

IEC 61439-1
Low-voltage switchgear and controlgear assemblies - Part 1: General rules

IEC 61439-5
Low-voltage switchgear and controlgear assemblies - Part 5: Assemblies for power distribution in public networks

IEC 62208 
Empty enclosures for low-voltage switchgear and controlgear assemblies - General requirements
ISO 12944-6
Paints and varnishes — Corrosion protection of steel structures by protective paint systems — Part 6: Laboratory performance test methods
UL 50 / CSA C22.2 Nº 94.1
Enclosures for Electrical Equipment, Non-Environmental Considerations
UL 50E / CSA C22.2Nº 94.2
Enclosures for Electrical Equipment, Environmental Considerations
UL 746 C
Standard for Polymeric Materials - Use in Electrical Equipment Evaluations

Capellades Lab is CTDP (Client Test Data Program) by UL since 1999, with a File number DA307
We can do the tests according to UL Standard with total autonomy and direct recognition of Underwriters Laboratories Inc.
